memory_entries.text: SQLite product-review DB: office products dataset uses g1 tables (items_g1, fdbk_g1, attrs_g1, taxn_g1, fdbk_stats_g1); electronics likely g2; musical instruments likely g3. items_g1 has ref_id PK, prc REAL list/catalog price, main_cat; fdbk_g1 has ref_id FK and ts as Unix epoch milliseconds, mostly 13 digits, with a few 15-digit microsecond-like anomalies. For office product review counts by year/price, join fdbk_g1 to items_g1 on ref_id and filter fdbk_g1.ts using ms epoch bounds and items_g1.prc strictly.
